ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, under maintenance, rented) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property was last updated */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property where the activity is scheduled */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of activity (e.g., viewing, maintenance, inspection) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the activity (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was last updated */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the person to contact for the activity */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person to contact for the activity */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the activity (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., viewing, maintenance, inspection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the activity type in minutes */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  "confirmation_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment confirmation (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being logged */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  "attended_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who attended the activity */,
  "attendance_confirmation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendance was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last updated */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., exterior, interior, floor plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., swimming pool, garage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was last updated */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., amenity, characteristic) */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., functional, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the property (1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback about the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., tenant, buyer) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
